text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
One day, while walking around<n>campus, I see a
crowd forming...

text_block_list.name: News Crew
text_block_list.text:
Everything's set for our "Hot Derby<n>Special"
full-day coverage. We're<n>ready to start shooting!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Aaaagh! Yeah, this interview's gotme really tense.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Okay, no more weird faces! Control<n>yourself! She
sells seashells, she<n>sells seashells...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Huh?! You're already filming?!

text_block_list.name: News Crew
text_block_list.text:
Relax! Just show us your fiery<n>passion for the
Derby in a way only<n>you can!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: O-okay! Get a load of this!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Afterwards, I see Winning Ticket<n>nervously being
interviewed<n>everywhere I go...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
HAH! My thigh muscles are<n>rock-hard from
doing these leg<n>presses!

text_block_list.name: News Crew
text_block_list.text:
Fascinating! So this is how you build<n>your leg
strength! And your dreams<n>for the Derby are
what motivated all<n>this, right?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Gah! Er, y-yeah! It's all for the<n>Derby!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Ooooh! Hamburger steak and omelet<n>rice! Time to
chow down!

text_block_list.name: News Crew
text_block_list.text:
Wow! Could these meal choices be<n>related to the
Derby as well?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Gwah! U-uh huh! They're totally...<n>related!
Probably!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: This is impossible! I'm totally onedge! I can't run like thiiiiis!

text_block_list.name: News Crew
text_block_list.text:
All right then, how about we call it a<n>day on the
running and switch to the<n>sit-down interview?

text_block_list.name: News Crew
text_block_list.text:
Still, I'm pretty surprised. Even a<n>seasoned
veteran like you gets<n>nervous, huh?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Well, you know... I mean, it'd be no<n>problem if
this was just a normal<n>interview.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
It's like whenever I talk about the<n>Derby, I get
super excited... and<n>maybe a little defensive?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Just watching the Derby makesmy heart pound in a totally differentway from other races!

text_block_list.name: News Crew
text_block_list.text: A different way, you say?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! I've always loved the Derby,<n>ever since I
was little. It's a fierce<n>competition where
everyone puts their<n>whole hearts into it.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Thinking about it makes my heart go<n>THUMP,
THUMP, THUMP!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
That's why everything's suddenly<n>like WOW!
And my body just goes<n>ZAZOOM!

text_block_list.name: News Crew
text_block_list.text:
So... In other words, the Derby<n>amazes you
enough to send your<n>emotions racing. Is that
correct?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! It's so awesome! Just talking<n>about it is
making me sweat... and...<n>and...

text_block_list.name: News Crew
text_block_list.text: Um... Ticket?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Waaaaagh! I need to run! Be right<n>back!

text_block_list.name: News Crew
text_block_list.text: R-run? You mean right now?!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Here I goooo!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: WOOOOOO! DERRRBYYYYY!

text_block_list.name: News Crew
text_block_list.text: T-Ticket! What about the interview?!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Afterwards, I hear that the interview<n>concluded
successfully after Winning<n>Ticket finished her
run.
